'''wadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wildly|wildly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wildly|wildly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wadate|wadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wadatesher|wadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadatesherĂ«m|wadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadatero|wadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wadateshĂ«|wadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadateshĂ«m|wadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadatero|gokiwadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwadateshĂ«|gokiwadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadateshĂ«m|gokiwadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowadankerom|gowadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowadankeshĂ«|gowadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowadankeshĂ«m|gowadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowadankeya|gowadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadaterom|wadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadatemu|wadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wadateya|wadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadaterom|gokiwadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadatemu|gokiwadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwadateya|gokiwadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wadadate|wadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wadadatesher|wadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadadatesherĂ«m|wadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadadatero|wadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wadadateshĂ«|wadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadadateshĂ«m|wadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadadatero|gokiwadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwadadateshĂ«|gokiwadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadadateshĂ«m|gokiwadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowadadankerom|gowadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowadadankeshĂ«|gowadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowadadankeshĂ«m|gowadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowadadankeya|gowadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wadadaterom|wadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wadadatemu|wadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wadadateya|wadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwadadaterom|gokiwadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwadadatemu|gokiwadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwadadateya|gokiwadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠte|wĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠtesher|wĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠtero|wĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠterom|wĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠtemu|wĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠdĂŠteya|wĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠdĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafdafte|wafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafdaftesher|wafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdaftesherĂ«m|wafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafdaftero|wafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafdafteshĂ«|wafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdafteshĂ«m|wafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafdaftero|gokiwafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafdafteshĂ«|gokiwafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafdafteshĂ«m|gokiwafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafdafnkerom|gowafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafdafnkeshĂ«|gowafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafdafnkeshĂ«m|gowafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafdafnkeya|gowafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafdafterom|wafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafdaftemu|wafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafdafteya|wafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafdafterom|gokiwafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafdaftemu|gokiwafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafdafteya|gokiwafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
